system.description:
The Accursed are men and women who have made pacts with otherworldly beings, intentionally or otherwise, and gained powers from that bond. Benefits of the Accursed. The Accursed is a partial Mage class that must be joined with a second partial class by an Adventurer. A Partial Warrior/Accursed might be a grim demonic warrior, a Partial Expert/Accursed a sinister tempter, and a Partial Mage/Accursed a sorcerer willing to pact with foul creatures. All Accursed gain Magic-0 during character creation; even non-spellcasters must understand eldritch beings and sorcery. Their attacks made through Accursed Blade and Accursed Bolt use Magic. Foci that normally apply to mundane weapons, such as Armsmaster or Deadeye, also benefit the relevant melee or ranged attacks: read Magic in place of Shoot or Stab when gaining their benefits, including the granted skill and stacking damage bonus.
